text: I feel the low hum of intention and deliberation in the air, each person poised at the threshold of unknown beginnings. The question reverberates within me—where do I want to start? The environment is charged with curiosity and reflection, faces turned toward possibility even as uncertainty lingers. I am both present and questioning, attentive to the open space that surrounds every origin point: possibility feels palpable, and the act of beginning becomes an act of self-discovery.
